candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line at the top of the income statement; valid top-line measure.
More specific core sales/revenue line and appears to represent the company's operating top-line.
Balancing item, not an actual reported revenue line; should not be preferred.

variables.notes: Used a priority list with the more specific operating top-line label first, then the total revenue label as fallback.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line on the income statement; best match for COGS among candidates.
Inventory asset on the balance sheet, not an expense; not COGS.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Raw Materials and Consumables - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value, not a reported expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct materials/consumables expense line as the best COGS proxy.

candidates.why: Personnel-related overhead component and populated across years; appropriate SG&A component.
Can be SG&A-related compensation, but likely already embedded in employee benefit expense; avoid double counting.
Could be overhead, but classification versus operating/production costs is less clear than other rows.
Broad operating overhead bucket; useful especially because explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty.
Selling expense component, but only populated in some years and appears to roll into Other Operating Expenses.
Administrative overhead component, but only populated in some years and appears to roll into Other Operating Expenses.
Semantically strong SG&A component but appears unpopulated in preview.
Explicit SG&A line exists; per rule, include it even though preview is empty, and supplement with closest overhead bucket.
Non-recurring restructuring-type item, not standard SG&A overhead.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty in the preview, so included it plus the closest populated overhead buckets to ensure coverage across years. Excluded Marketing and Administrative Expenses to avoid double counting against the broader Other Operating Expenses row in years where those components are disclosed. Excluded Share-based payments because it is likely embedded in Employee Benefit Expenses.
No dedicated research and development line is visible on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line that includes more than interest; usable only as fallback.
Specific interest expense component, but limited to lease interest only.
Too broad/other, not clearly interest.
Direct interest expense line and best primary choice among candidates.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Direct interest label, but appears unpopulated in preview; still a valid fallback if used in other years.
Direct interest expense label; valid fallback though preview appears empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest supplemental disclosure, better than broad finance costs but narrower than total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list favors explicit interest-expense labels first, then narrower lease-interest disclosures, with broad Financial Expenses only as last fallback.

candidates.row_label: Distribution of Net Result to Equity Holders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Income statement profit allocation line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Distribution of net result to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement profit allocation line, not balance sheet equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Best direct balance sheet measure of book equity attributable to shareholders.
Broader total equity including minority interest if any; acceptable fallback only if no cleaner shareholder equity line exists.

variables.notes: Preferred shareholder equity total to avoid double counting minority interest. Included Total Equity & Minority Interest only as fallback in case label usage changes over time.

candidates.why: This is total equity, not a standalone non-controlling interest line; not suitable for MIB.

variables.notes: No separate minority interest/non-controlling interest line is visible. Because BE uses Shareholders equity, total, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
